463 RPT_CRCT_DAY_DSCHRG_CD RPT_CRCT_DAY_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Temporal Orientation - Day (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to identify the current day of the week. 1 = Correct 
0 = Incorrect or no answer 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank (Skip Pattern)
